question: How many days passed between the end of the 2026 G7 summit in France and the start of the NATO summit in Turkey?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The 2026 G7 summit in Évian, France ran from June 15–17, 2026, ending on **June 17, 2026** ([Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/52nd_G7_summit); [Consilium](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/)).

The 2026 NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey began on **July 7, 2026** ([Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Ankara_NATO_summit)).

Counting from June 17 to July 7, 2026, that is **20 days**.

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**20 days** passed between the G7 summit’s end on **June 17, 2026**, and the NATO summit’s start on **July 7, 2026**.

Sources: [Council of the EU](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/) · [NATO](https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/events/event-programmes/2026/07/nato-summit-2026)
